item.description: Please excuse the live expletives of the understandably animated observer. #winter #snow #awesome #weather
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: This place needs more rugby
item.description:
Strong girl. Lift?
Run, big fella!
Classic bants
Honestly, it do feel like that
It's an old meme sir, but it still checks out
Fuck that
I am confident I never caused a scrum penalty, but only because I never knew what they we ever called for
Keeping this one for next week. Preseason is starting again baby!
I hated this as a back, but as a forward, I knew they couldn't be trusted.
Scrums are the best fun you can have with 7 other guys! And I say that as a member of a predominantly gay rugby team!
I never looked as good in either position.
This one is also in my rugbygay folder... ?
He ruined the Wallabies too. Have so many memes about him from then, but he's gone now, so
We had a Bring Back Dave Rennie group chat going through this whole saga with the Wallabies.
It's an even older meme sir, and it doesn't really check out any more, should we shoot it down?
Just to show the boys can lift too. (Another one that's also in my rugbygay folder)
item.dc:creator: 11thHourGhost

item.title: Memes vol 460
item.description:
Since we’ve last spoken I’ve gotten 9 new calico critters… Christmas was a plentiful time
Have y’all seen Elon musk carrying around his kid everywhere since Luigi? God I hate him so much. I’d say more but they’re going to put me on a watchlist if I say what I want to
LOOK UP THE PICTURE YALL- look up “Horace Bristol naked gunner” because it’s a fucking amazing picture- the man is beautiful, the butt is great, the sign that says “this is the enemy” right above his butt is fantastic.
Me
The lighthouse (2019)
This list has 2 of my favorites ever. Night at the Museum and Newsies- I prefer the Broadway version but both of the Jack Kelly’s are bisexual as hell- like the lyric “Look, girls are nice, once or twice Till I find someone new” UM YEAH OK
I’d go sit with my dog as she died because she was alone when it happened. Oh great now I’m crying.
Liza Jane tax
Nessie in her new tank tax
Froggy tax
Scruffy tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Aggressive affirmations
item.description: Len Pennie, Scots poet and activist https://www.instagram.com/reel/DEWLmSLo5vY/?igsh=MWQwODBkMm9lazk5cA== (Original audio, sound was a bit weird on the original post to start with.) This is intended to raise a smile, not toxic positivity - Ms Pennie doesn't go in for that.
item.dc:creator: RunawaySpoons

item.title: Dangit Brain, stop borfing me over!
item.description: I'm definitely not gonna let anxiety and depression win this time! But holyhells is it tempting to just yeet my tablet into oblivion. Edit: Thank you so much everyone! It's so inspiring to have such wonderful feedback and support from all of you. I will definitely post something soon!
item.dc:creator: ScalieMistake

Hi.
It's the January sale. They're all BOGO.
.
.
And it was a good time.
.
Don't do this.
.
.
.
.
Heh.
.
.
.
.
Artist @msbhaiive on X.
It's true.
.
Cooper Tax
item.dc:creator: GirlUndone

item.title: Still trying to perfect the recipe, but getting closer
item.description:
Have been experimenting with my prop making. Couple didn't quite go right, but added extra grime to them and they came out looking good. Really happy with the glow though!
Caps have vinyl decals which give them a more "screen printed" feel than paper
Can't forget a nuclear apocalypse worth of weathering! Scratching off parts of the label, sanding and scratching the cap, followed by 3 shades of inks.
item.dc:creator: Blake242

item.title: FCC's Net Neutrality Rules Struck Down by Sixth Circuit
item.description: “Net neutrality rules, which disallow broadband providers from messing with internet speeds depending on the website, were struck down Thursday by the Sixth Circuit. Federal law shows that broadband must be classified as an “information service” and not the more heavily-regulated “telecommunications service” the Federal Communications Commission said it was when it adopted the rules in April 2024, a three-judge panel for the US Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit ruled. The FCC lacked the authority to impose its rules on the broadband providers, the court said.” https://news.bloomberglaw.com/litigation/fccs-net-neutrality-rules-struck-down-by-sixth-circuit
item.dc:creator: charondaboatman

item.title: Memes vol 459 Boobie
item.description:
He punched a wall in his door when he was- oh this was last year- playing 2K
His tattoo is of a frog with a bong- I helped design it
THE MOM IS HOLDING A SANDAL
He sent me this when I was wearing a dress that color. It was actually my grandmas wedding dress and it’s short for what it is. I wore it to church on Christmas Eve
CHRISTOPHER ILL NEVER FORGIVE YOU FOR THAT ONE “oh it’s not even that scary” UH HUH
Me and him
Now these are memes I saved about him before we started dating. This one is from the day before er started dating
Also a day before we started dating
I sent this to him and it took everything to be like “hey wanna experiment?”
The reason I noticed him was because of his whore shorts and his ginormous thighs
Ok now we’re back to regular memes
THIS IS SO HIM HE FELL ASLEEP WATCHING THE MUPPETS LAST NIGHT
“Chrissy, yo quiero comer culo” “YOU WANT TO EAT ASS?!?!”
Scruffy, Froggy, and Liza Jane tax I love you @chriscaprisun
